---
title: "YR_presentation"
subtitle: "<br/>with xaringan"
author: "Yanxi_Ren"
institute: "UCL"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  xaringan::moon_reader:
    lib_dir: libs
    nature:
      highlightStyle: github
      highlightLines: true
      countIncrementalSlides: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r}

```


```{r}

```





```{r}

```
